steps.title: Graph the equations
steps.content:
Enter the two equations as written:
$$y=x+13$$
$$y=4x$$

steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content: The slopes are different: one line has slope $1$, and the other has slope $4$. Two nonparallel lines intersect at exactly one point.

steps.title: Count intersections
steps.content: Because the two lines are not parallel, their graphs intersect at $1$ point. The answer is B.
